title: Data Link Layer Protocol Operation Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental steps and decision logic a data link layer protocol follows to transmit a frame reliably over a physical link.
relationships: Sender transmits frame and starts timer
Receiver receives frame and checks for errors
If error-free, Receiver sends ACK; if corrupted, Receiver discards frame
Sender receives ACK and sends next frame
If timer expires before ACK, Sender retransmits the original frame
